rationale: 27017 cl.5.1.1 adds cloud-service-specific policy implementation guidance for CSP/CSC, covering a narrower cloud-context subset of the broader A.5.1 requirement.

source_title: Review of the policies for information security (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.5.1.2 adds cloud-specific review guidance; the review obligation is a sub-element of A.5.1 which covers the full policy lifecycle.

source_title: Information security roles and responsibilities (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.6.1.1 provides cloud-specific role assignment guidance (CSP vs CSC split); A.5.2 sets the full organisational RBAC requirement.
27017 cl.6.1.2 and A.5.3 both require segregation of duties; the cloud guidance adds virtualisation context but is co-extensive at the control level.
27017 cl.6.1.3 restates the authority-contact requirement with cloud-service context; maps 1:1 to A.5.5.

source_title: Contact with special interest groups (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.6.1.4 maps directly to A.5.6; cloud guidance adds CSP-forum participation but control intent is co-extensive.

source_title: Information security in project management (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.6.1.5 provides cloud-context project-security guidance that maps co-extensively to A.5.8.

source_title: Shared roles and responsibilities within a cloud computing environment
rationale: CLD.6.3.1 is a cloud-additive control requiring explicit shared-responsibility matrices between CSP and CSC; A.5.2 covers general role assignment but not the CSP/CSC split specifically, so 27017 is broader for cloud.

source_title: Shared roles and responsibilities within a cloud computing environment
rationale: CLD.6.3.1 shared-responsibility matrices also overlap with A.5.19 supplier-relationship obligations; the relationship is partial/related rather than direct.
27017 cl.7.2.1 restates management accountability for information security in cloud context; maps co-extensively to A.5.4.

source_title: Information security awareness, education and training (cloud guidance)
target_title: Information security awareness, education and training
rationale: 27017 cl.7.2.2 adds cloud-specific training topics (shared responsibility, cloud risks); control intent maps 1:1 to A.6.3.

source_title: Termination and change of employment — security (cloud guidance)
target_title: Responsibilities after termination or change of employment
rationale: 27017 cl.7.3.1 and A.6.5 both address post-employment obligations; cloud guidance adds CSP access revocation specifics but is co-extensive at the control level.

target_title: Inventory of information and other associated assets
rationale: 27017 cl.8.1.1 requires asset inventory inclusive of cloud-hosted assets; maps 1:1 to A.5.9 which covers all information and associated assets.

target_title: Inventory of information and other associated assets
rationale: 27017 cl.8.1.2 addresses asset ownership in cloud (CSP vs CSC); A.5.9 includes ownership as a sub-element of inventory management.

target_title: Acceptable use of information and other associated assets
rationale: 27017 cl.8.1.3 applies acceptable-use policies to cloud assets; maps 1:1 to A.5.10.
27017 cl.8.1.4 addresses return of assets at cloud contract end; maps co-extensively to A.5.11.

source_title: Removal of cloud service customer assets
rationale: CLD.8.1.5 is cloud-additive: it requires secure removal/return of CSC assets including data wipe verification not covered in A.5.11 alone.

source_title: Removal of cloud service customer assets
rationale: CLD.8.1.5 overlaps with A.8.10 (information deletion) when customer assets include data that must be verifiably erased at contract end.
27017 cl.8.2.1 applies classification schemes to cloud-hosted data (CSP must honour CSC classifications); maps 1:1 to A.5.12.
27017 cl.8.2.2 and A.5.13 both require labelling aligned to classification; cloud guidance adds metadata/tag mechanisms but is co-extensive.

target_title: Acceptable use of information and other associated assets
rationale: 27017 cl.8.2.3 handling procedures in cloud map into the broader acceptable-use and asset-handling intent of A.5.10.
27017 cl.8.3.1 addresses removable/cloud storage media; maps to A.7.10 which consolidates removable media management.
27017 cl.9.1.1 mandates access-control policy for cloud services (CSP and CSC views); maps 1:1 to A.5.15.

source_title: Access to networks and network services (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.9.1.2 adds cloud-network access controls; A.8.20 covers broader network security; 27017 is a cloud-specific subset.
27017 cl.9.2.1 covers cloud user provisioning/deprovisioning; maps 1:1 to A.5.16 identity management.
27017 cl.9.2.2 access provisioning in cloud contexts maps co-extensively to A.5.18 which covers access rights lifecycle.

source_title: Management of privileged access rights (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.9.2.3 privileged access management in cloud (admin accounts, CSP super-admin) maps 1:1 to A.8.2.

source_title: Management of secret authentication information of users (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.9.2.4 secret-auth-info management in cloud maps co-extensively to A.5.17.

source_title: Review of user access rights (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.9.2.5 periodic review of cloud user access rights is a sub-element of the full access-rights lifecycle in A.5.18.

source_title: Removal or adjustment of access rights (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.9.2.6 revocation of cloud access maps into A.5.18; the cloud guidance adds CSP-API revocation specifics not in the parent control.

source_title: Use of secret authentication information (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.9.3.1 end-user secret-auth usage in cloud is a use-case subset of A.5.17.
27017 cl.9.4.1 and A.8.3 both control information access restriction; cloud guidance adds multi-tenant isolation context but is co-extensive.
27017 cl.9.4.2 secure log-on for cloud consoles/APIs maps 1:1 to A.8.5 secure authentication.
27017 cl.9.4.3 cloud-service password management is a technical sub-element of A.5.17.

source_title: Use of privileged utility programs (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.9.4.4 and A.8.18 both restrict privileged utility program usage; cloud guidance adds hypervisor-level tools but intent is co-extensive.

source_title: Access control to program source code (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.9.4.5 source-code access in cloud (CSP dev pipelines) maps 1:1 to A.8.4.
CLD.9.5.1 is cloud-additive: it mandates virtual-tenant isolation (hypervisor, VM, container level) which extends beyond the network-layer segregation in A.8.22.
CLD.9.5.1 virtual-environment segregation has a logical overlap with A.5.3 (duties) when admin access to hypervisors must be duty-separated.
CLD.9.5.2 is cloud-additive: it requires baseline hardening of VMs/containers; A.8.9 covers configuration management broadly but does not specify VM hardening baselines.
CLD.9.5.2 VM hardening overlaps with A.8.8 vulnerability management since unpatched VM images introduce technical vulnerabilities.

source_title: Policy on the use of cryptographic controls (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.10.1.1 cryptography policy for cloud services maps 1:1 to A.8.24; cloud guidance adds CSP-managed vs customer-managed key contexts.
27017 cl.10.1.2 key management is a sub-element of A.8.24; cloud guidance adds BYOK/HYOK and CSP key-escrow considerations.

source_title: Protecting against external and environmental threats (cloud guidance)
target_title: Protecting against physical and environmental threats
rationale: 27017 cl.11.1.4 maps co-extensively to A.7.5; cloud guidance focuses on CSP data-centre environmental controls.

source_title: Security of equipment and assets off-premises (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.11.2.6 and A.7.9 both address off-premises asset security; cloud context covers portable devices accessing cloud services.

source_title: Secure disposal or re-use of equipment (cloud guidance)
target_title: Secure disposal or re-use of equipment
rationale: 27017 cl.11.2.7 and A.7.14 both require secure media/hardware disposal; cloud guidance adds CSP storage-media sanitisation specifics.
27017 cl.12.1.1 requires documented procedures for cloud operations; maps 1:1 to A.5.37.
27017 cl.12.1.2 cloud change management (CSP change notifications to CSC) maps co-extensively to A.8.32.
27017 cl.12.1.3 and A.8.6 both require capacity planning; cloud guidance adds elastic-scaling and SLA-capacity monitoring.
CLD.12.1.5 is cloud-additive: it requires dedicated admin procedures for cloud-admin (CSP side) including JIT access and admin audit trails, extending beyond the access-rights scope of A.8.2.
CLD.12.1.5 admin operational security also requires documented admin procedures that overlap with A.5.37.
27017 cl.12.3.1 backup in cloud (CSP backup obligations, CSC backup responsibility) maps 1:1 to A.8.13.
27017 cl.12.4.1 event logging for cloud services (CSP logs, CSC audit logs) maps co-extensively to A.8.15.
27017 cl.12.4.2 log integrity protection is a sub-element of A.8.15 which covers the full logging lifecycle.
27017 cl.12.4.3 privileged-user logs in cloud context is a sub-element of A.8.15.
27017 cl.12.4.4 and A.8.17 both require clock sync; cloud guidance adds NTP-source requirements for distributed cloud systems.

CLD.12.4.5 is cloud-additive: it requires CSP to provide monitoring capabilities to CSC and defines what cloud service metrics must be monitored, extending beyond the general monitoring requirement of A.8.16.
CLD.12.4.5 monitoring of cloud services requires logs and audit trails, overlapping with A.8.15 logging requirements.

source_title: Installation of software on operational systems (cloud guidance)
target_title: Installation of software on operational systems
rationale: 27017 cl.12.5.1 software installation controls in cloud environments map 1:1 to A.8.19.
27017 cl.12.6.1 vulnerability management for cloud (CSP patching SLAs, CSC responsibility for guest OS) maps 1:1 to A.8.8.

target_title: Installation of software on operational systems
rationale: 27017 cl.12.6.2 software installation restrictions are a sub-element of A.8.19.
27017 cl.13.1.1 cloud network controls (virtual networks, SDN) map co-extensively to A.8.20.
27017 cl.13.1.2 and A.8.21 both address security of network services; cloud guidance adds cloud-interconnect and VPN service specifics.
27017 cl.13.1.3 network segregation in cloud (VPC, subnets) maps 1:1 to A.8.22.

source_title: Alignment of security management for virtual and physical networks
rationale: CLD.13.1.4 is cloud-additive: it requires explicit parity between virtual-network and physical-network security policies, a cloud-specific obligation not covered in A.8.20 alone.

source_title: Alignment of security management for virtual and physical networks
rationale: CLD.13.1.4 virtual/physical network alignment also reinforces A.8.22 segregation requirements in cloud-native architectures.

source_title: Information transfer policies and procedures (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.13.2.1 information transfer policies for cloud (data-in-transit encryption, API security) map 1:1 to A.5.14.
27017 cl.13.2.2 transfer agreements are a contractual sub-element of A.5.14.

source_title: Information security requirements analysis and specification (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.14.1.1 security requirements for cloud-hosted applications map 1:1 to A.8.26.

source_title: Securing application services on public networks (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.14.1.2 public-cloud API security is a sub-element of A.8.26 application security requirements.
27017 cl.14.1.3 transaction protection in cloud is a sub-element of A.8.26.
27017 cl.14.2.1 secure development in cloud environments maps 1:1 to A.8.25.

target_title: Secure systems architecture and engineering principles
rationale: 27017 cl.14.2.5 secure engineering for cloud (defence-in-depth, zero-trust) maps 1:1 to A.8.27.

target_title: Separation of development, test and production environments
rationale: 27017 cl.14.2.6 secure dev environment in cloud is a sub-element of A.8.31 environment separation.

target_title: Security testing in development and acceptance
rationale: 27017 cl.14.2.8 cloud system security testing maps 1:1 to A.8.29.

source_title: Information security policy for supplier relationships (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.15.1.1 supplier security policy for cloud providers maps 1:1 to A.5.19.

source_title: Addressing security within supplier agreements (cloud guidance)
target_title: Addressing information security within supplier agreements
rationale: 27017 cl.15.1.2 adds cloud-specific contract clauses (SLA, audit rights, data sovereignty) on top of A.5.20.

target_title: Managing information security in the ICT supply chain
rationale: 27017 cl.15.1.3 ICT supply chain for cloud (sub-processors, sub-contractors) maps 1:1 to A.5.21.

source_title: Monitoring and review of supplier services (cloud guidance)
target_title: Monitoring, review and change management of supplier services
rationale: 27017 cl.15.2.1 cloud supplier service monitoring (CSP SLA reviews, audit reports) maps 1:1 to A.5.22.

source_title: Managing changes to supplier services (cloud guidance)
target_title: Monitoring, review and change management of supplier services
rationale: 27017 cl.15.2.2 change management for cloud supplier services is a sub-element of the broader A.5.22.

source_title: Responsibilities and procedures — incident management (cloud guidance)
target_title: Information security incident management planning and preparation
rationale: 27017 cl.16.1.1 cloud incident management roles (CSP notification obligations to CSC) map 1:1 to A.5.24.

source_title: Reporting information security events — cloud guidance
rationale: 27017 cl.16.1.2 event reporting for cloud (CSP-to-CSC breach notification) maps 1:1 to A.6.8.

source_title: Assessment of and decision on information security events (cloud guidance)
target_title: Assessment and decision on information security events
rationale: 27017 cl.16.1.4 cloud event assessment and triage maps 1:1 to A.5.25.

source_title: Response to information security incidents (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.16.1.5 cloud incident response (CSP remediation obligations) maps 1:1 to A.5.26.

source_title: Learning from information security incidents (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.16.1.6 post-incident review in cloud maps 1:1 to A.5.27.
27017 cl.16.1.7 evidence collection in cloud (forensic log preservation by CSP) maps 1:1 to A.5.28.
27017 cl.17.1.1 continuity planning for cloud services maps 1:1 to A.5.29.
27017 cl.17.1.2 implementation of continuity measures for cloud is a sub-element of A.5.29.

source_title: Verify, review and evaluate information security continuity (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.17.1.3 testing continuity of cloud services is a sub-element of A.5.29.

source_title: Availability of information processing facilities (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.17.2.1 availability requirements for cloud (SLA uptime, multi-AZ) map 1:1 to A.8.14.

source_title: Identification of applicable legislation and contractual requirements (cloud guidance)
target_title: Identification of legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements
rationale: 27017 cl.18.1.1 legal/regulatory identification for cloud (data residency laws, jurisdictional scope) maps 1:1 to A.5.31.
27017 cl.18.1.2 IPR in cloud (CSP licensing obligations) maps 1:1 to A.5.32.
27017 cl.18.1.3 record protection in cloud (immutable storage, retention policies) maps 1:1 to A.5.33.

source_title: Privacy and protection of personally identifiable information (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.18.1.4 PII protection in cloud maps 1:1 to A.5.34.
27017 cl.18.1.5 regulatory crypto requirements in cloud (export controls, national crypto laws) is a compliance-context sub-element of A.8.24.

source_title: Independent review of information security (cloud guidance)
rationale: 27017 cl.18.2.1 independent review of cloud security posture maps 1:1 to A.5.35.

source_title: Compliance with security policies and standards (cloud guidance)
target_title: Compliance with policies and standards for information security
rationale: 27017 cl.18.2.2 policy compliance checking in cloud maps 1:1 to A.5.36.

target_title: Compliance with policies and standards for information security
rationale: 27017 cl.18.2.3 technical compliance scanning/audit in cloud is a sub-element of A.5.36.
27017 cl.12.2.1 anti-malware controls for cloud workloads (CSP-provided vs CSC-managed AV) map 1:1 to A.8.7.
27017 cl.6.2.1 mobile device policy for cloud access is a subset of A.8.1 which covers all endpoint device security.
27017 cl.6.2.2 teleworking/remote access to cloud services maps 1:1 to A.6.7.

target_title: Security testing in development and acceptance
rationale: 27017 cl.14.2.9 acceptance testing for cloud systems is a sub-element of A.8.29.

target_title: Protection of information systems during audit testing
rationale: 27017 cl.12.7.1 audit controls for cloud information systems map 1:1 to A.8.34.
